# Extracao: Module 9

- **Fonte:** Module 9.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

﻿MODULE 9 BUSINESS LAUNCH FORMULA

Welcome to Module 9 of Product Launch Formula. This is where you get a roadmap for building your business with launches. By the end of this module you’ll know how to build out multiple products and offers to your list with the different types of launches you’ve learned about in Product Launch Formula.

1 Introduction [2 minutes]
This lesson will introduce you to how to build a true business using launches as a foundation.
	
2 The Launch Life [19 minutes]
What would it mean to you if you did a great launch? Then did it again, and again, and again? In this lesson, you'll learn how to build a business involving different types of products and different types of launches.

3 Business Launch Strategy [17 minutes]
In this lesson you’ll see the Business Launch Strategy in action as Jeff walks you through the journey of one of his most successful students, John Gallagher. As you’ll see, the most important thing is that you need to launch. Launch, then improve your launch, and launch again.
	
4 Building a Team [18 minutes]
Part of building a business is identifying what you need to do now to build your team, and what you need to be thinking about down the road as you grow. In this lesson you'll get a peek behind the scenes at the growth of my team (and learn about the mistakes I made along the way, so you can avoid them).

5 Mental Game and Self Care [13 minutes]
Your growth is 100% about your inner mental game and keeping it as strong as possible. The road to launch isn't always easy... the key is remembering that progress trumps perfection every time. That's what this lesson is all about.

6 Conclusion [3 minutes]
Congratulations… you made it through Product Launch Formula! Before you go, I have a quick parting message that will help you on your journey.
